channel.title: Kali Linux 2020.1 on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Kali Linux 2020.1 on ExitCode0

item.title: Kali Linux 2020.1 - No more root by default
item.description: Kali Linux 2020.1 drops root as default user, switching to standard privilege model. How the change affects penetration testing workflows and sudo configuration in the new setup.
